result.summary: Found 3 major issues: text truncation/overflow in multiple places causing incomplete content display, and potential responsive design problems affecting readability.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is cut off - 'Hot Gar' should likely be 'Hot Games' but the text is truncated on the right side of the tab bar
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab container width or use text truncation with ellipsis (...) to handle overflow more gracefully, or stack navigation items vertically

issues.description: Exclusive game card titles are cut off on the right side - visible text shows 'MAGNI' (likely 'MAGNIFICENT PHOENIX' or similar) and 'MUNC' (likely 'MUNCHERS' or similar)
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card containers have sufficient width, reduce font size for titles, or implement text truncation with ellipsis (...) for long game names

issues.description: Some game card images and text appear to have inconsistent alignment and spacing across different rows in both the Exclusive Games and New Games sections
issues.suggestion: Standardize card dimensions and implement consistent grid layout with proper gutters to ensure uniform appearance across all game cards
